channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chef Kenny Atkinson Shares Tips on Supermarket Meat, Affordable Ingredients, and Cooking Essentials
item.description: In a recent interview for Sky News' Cheap Eats series, Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson discussed affordable yet high-quality cooking ingredients, supermarket tips, and essential kitchen tools. At...

item.title: Supreme Court Order May Lead to Dismissal of Steve Bannon's Congressional Contempt Conviction
item.description: Steve Bannon, a longtime ally of former President Donald Trump, has secured a Supreme Court order that could result in the dismissal of his 2022 conviction for contempt of Congress. The case stemmed f...

item.title: Israel strikes major Iranian petrochemical facilities, significantly reducing exports
item.description: Israel’s Defence Forces have targeted two of Iran’s largest petrochemical facilities, including the one in Asaluyeh, which alone accounts for about half of the country’s petrochemical output. The comb...

item.title: Tanzania trains top students for global mathematics competitions
item.description: Tanzania has taken a major step in strengthening its science and mathematics education after selecting 34 top-performing students from over 5,000 participants for advanced training and international r...

item.title: Iran Rejects Temporary Ceasefire as Israel Strikes Major Petrochemical Plant
item.description: Tensions between Israel and Iran continue to escalate, with Israel recently launching an attack on a key petrochemical plant at the South Pars gas field, which is a significant part of Iran's energy p...

item.title: Ebuka Criticizes Tinubu's Campaign Billboard Over Nigeria's Security Crisis
item.description: Nigerian gospel singer Ebuka has voiced his displeasure with President Bola Tinubu's latest campaign billboard ahead of the 2027 elections. The billboard, featuring the slogan 'Expect More 2027,' spar...

item.title: Marcus faces tough choices in a high-stakes chase and battle in 'Blood vs Duty' Episode 1
item.description: In the first episode of ABS-CBN’s new series 'Blood vs Duty', the character Marcus, played by Richard Gutierrez, is thrust into an intense and dramatic chase against Peklat, a formidable adversary por...

item.title: Dominique Bikaba’s efforts to safeguard gorillas and Indigenous communities in eastern DRC
item.description: Dominique Bikaba, 54, has dedicated his life to protecting the eastern lowland or Grauer’s gorilla and supporting Indigenous communities in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). Displaced as a c...

item.title: How to Choose a Quality School Holiday Program for Your Child
item.description: School holiday programs can offer vital support to families during term breaks, providing children with structured activities while parents work. Programs vary widely, from general school-based activi...

item.title: Understanding the Challenges Limiting Nigeria’s Local Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
item.description: Nigeria, a country with more than 230 million people, still imports around 70% of its medicines despite having over 120 pharmaceutical manufacturers. Most of these local producers focus on simple, low...

item.title: Moro farmer Said Sakilan Bansil killed in gun attack in Radjah Buayan, Maguindanao del Sur; wife and infant daughter wounded
item.description: In a tragic incident in the restive province of Maguindanao del Sur, a Moro farmer identified as Said Sakilan Bansil was killed instantly when unidentified gunmen armed with assault rifles opened fire...

item.title: Health authorities urge vaccinations as Super-K flu spreads early in Australia
item.description: Australia is seeing an unusually early start to its flu season due to a fast-spreading variant known as the Super-K flu or subclade K. Experts are urging the public to get vaccinated to prevent a repe...

item.title: Claim of Poached Tiger Carcass Burial Surfaces After 23 Days
item.description: A claim has emerged that a tiger carcass, allegedly poached, was buried 23 days after its discovery. This sensational allegation adds to the ongoing concerns regarding wildlife poaching and the challe...

item.title: Mbalula confident ANC will regain Umkhonto We Sizwe trademark
item.description: ANC Secretary-General Fikile Mbalula has expressed confidence that the party will win its ongoing court case to reclaim the Umkhonto We Sizwe trademark. Speaking at a commemoration event for Solomon K...

item.title: Group Raises Concerns Over Decentralized Pipeline Surveillance in Niger Delta
item.description: A group has warned that decentralizing pipeline surveillance in the Niger Delta region could lead to increased dangers and instability. The warning comes amidst ongoing efforts to enhance security aro...

item.title: Security forces repel attacks in Katsina, three people killed
item.description: For Katsina, wahala burst on Karadua–Musawa Road as armed bandits block road, shoot motorist, kill two civilians for spot. Police and military plus local vigilantes rush the scene quick quick, chase a...

item.title: Embracing Patina: How Living Metals are Transforming Home Design
item.description: The design trend of using 'living metals' like brass, copper, and bronze in interiors is gaining popularity. These materials, known for their ability to develop patina over time, offer a dynamic, evol...

item.title: Labs warn of quality and safety concerns amid rising use of unregulated peptides
item.description: The UK is experiencing a surge in the use of unregulated injectable peptides, driven by claims that they support weight-loss, enhance focus, and improve physical appearance. These peptides, short chai...

item.title: PCSO: Walang nanalo sa jackpot sa Megalotto at Grand Lotto noong Abril 6
item.description: Wala pang nanalo ng jackpot prize sa dalawang pangunahing lotto draws ng Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) noong Lunes, Abril 6, 2026. Ang Megalotto 6/45, na may jackpot na P15,000,000, ay ...

item.title: Budget cars with the best fuel range in South Africa
item.description: As fuel prices continue to rise — with inland 95 octane now at R23.36 per litre — South African motorists are increasingly focused on fuel efficiency. TimesLIVE Motoring staff analysed a range of vehi...
